  "findings": [
    "Cotter pin omitted on castle nut"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install the correct size cotter pin through the castle nut and ball joint/tie rod stud, and bend the prongs securely to lock it in place."
  ],
  "rationale": "A castle nut on a suspension or steering joint requires a cotter pin to prevent the nut from backing off due to vibration. Omitting the cotter pin is a critical safety defect that can lead to catastrophic joint separation and loss of vehicle control.",
  "references": [
    "OEM Assembly Specifications",
    "Standard Torque and Fastener Locking Procedures"
  ]
}
